name: Handbag
description:
Authentic Hermès Bolide pouch in the larger GM size, crafted in vibrant red cotton canvas with signature tonal H embroidery. Features a zip-top closure with leather pull and iconic orange interior lining.

The GM size offers generous capacity, making it ideal as a cosmetic bag, travel organizer, or everyday clutch. A classic Hermès accessory that is both functional and collectible.

Condition:
	•	Very good Pre-Owned Condition
	•	Light Surface Wear, Minor Fading To Canvas
	•	Interior Clean With Light Signs Of Use
	•	Zipper Functions Smoothly
	
Details:
	•	Brand: Hermès
	•	Model: Bolide Pouch GM
	•	Made In France
	•	Material: 100% Cotton Canvas
	•	Trim: Leather Zipper Pull
	•	Closure: Zip Top
	•	Hardware: Silver Tone
	•	Interior: Signature Orange Cotton Lining
	•	Color: Red Exterior / Orange Interior
	•	Category: Cosmetic Bag / Travel Pouch / Clutch

Approximate Measurements:
	•	Length: 10"
	•	Height: 7"
	•	Width: 3"
